title: mitrasacme thedae
intro: Mitrasacme thedae is a plant species that belongs to the family Loganiaceae, commonly known as the spasmolytic or throatwort plant. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its spasmolytic and expectorant effects, which help to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and soothing throat irritations. In herbal preparations, Mitrasacme thedae is often made into tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions.
